pullRequest.title: DOM-75386 Preserve route and query params in extended identity propagation consent callback

nodes.body: I think we should also check that the query parameters are added as expected.

that's not possible here. this is a unit test spec for the execution resource params maker. the query params and route come from an actual app request via `your browser => ... some hops ... => app nginx lua code`

i already linked it to the e2e test ticket and the AC there, it's something we can and should test there. https://dominodatalab.atlassian.net/browse/DOM-75049
oh, and if we had "integration" tests for apps, we could test it there -- so best we can do is an e2e test
